name: portico-desktop
description: Portico - Local-first personal desktop agent workbench

scripts.tauri:build:macos:local: APPLE_SIGNING_IDENTITY=- pnpm exec tauri build --bundles dmg
scripts.format:check: pnpm --filter desktop-ui format:check && pnpm --filter desktop-ui exec prettier --check ../../package.json ../../e2e/desktop/run.mjs
